recommendations.title: Female Prisoner #701: Scorpion
recommendations.overview: After being cruelly set up and deceived by Sugimi, a detective in cahoots with the mob with whom she was whole-heartedly in love, Matsushima’s desire for revenge knows no bounds.

recommendations.title: Demon City
recommendations.overview: Framed for his family's murder and left for dead, an ex-hitman will stop at nothing to exact revenge on the masked "demons" who have taken over his city.

recommendations.title: Guardians
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Action, Fantasy, Comedy, Thriller
recommendations.overview: During the Cold War, an organization called "Patriot" created a superhero squad, which includes members of multiple Soviet republics. For years, the heroes had to hide their identities, but, in hard times, they must show themselves again.

recommendations.title: Minnal Murali
recommendations.overview: A tailor gains special powers after being struck by lightning but must take down an unexpected foe if he is to become the superhero his hometown in Kerala needs.

recommendations.title: Krrish
recommendations.overview: In Singapore, Krishna is forced by circumstances to use his superpowers and become a masked superhero named Krrish, before getting drawn towards his lost legacy.

recommendations.title: Daredevil
recommendations.overview: A man blinded in a childhood accident fights crime using his superhumanly-elevated remaining senses.

recommendations.title: X-Men
recommendations.overview: Two mutants, Rogue and Wolverine, come to a private academy for their kind whose resident superhero team, the X-Men, must oppose a terrorist organization with similar powers.

recommendations.title: Sparks
recommendations.overview: A masked vigilante who discovers the dark side to heroism. Going after the nation's most notorious super criminal leaves Sparks' life and reputation in ruins.

recommendations.title: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings
recommendations.overview: Shang-Chi must confront the past he thought he left behind when he is drawn into the web of the mysterious Ten Rings organization.

recommendations.title: The Man from Nowhere
recommendations.overview: A reclusive pawnshop owner goes on a brutal rampage to rescue a young girl kidnapped by a criminal organization.
